Package index

All functions

NCI60
NCI60 Dataset
crab
Australian Crabs Dataset
crabs
Crabs Dataset
fishcatch
Fish Catch Dataset
formula(<pprf>)
Extracts the formula used to train a pprf model.
formula(<pptr>)
Extracts the formula used to train a pptr model.
glass
Glass Dataset
image
Image Dataset
iris
Iris Flower Dataset
leukemia
Leukemia Dataset
load_json()
Load a model from a JSON file.
lymphoma
Lymphoma Dataset
olive
Olive Dataset
parkinson
Parkinson Dataset
plot(<pprf>)
Plot a pprf model.
plot(<pptr>)
Plot a pptr model.
pp_rand_forest()
Parsnip model specification for pprf.
pp_tree()
Parsnip model specification for pptr.
pprf()
Trains a Random Forest of Project-Pursuit oblique decision trees.
pptr()
Trains a Project-Pursuit oblique decision tree.
predict(<pprf>)
Predicts the labels or vote proportions of a set of observations using a pprf model.
predict(<pptr>)
Predicts the labels or class indicators of a set of observations using a pptr model.
print(<pprf>)
Prints a pprf model.
print(<pptr>)
Prints a pptr model.
save_json()
Save a model to a JSON file.
summary(<pprf>)
Summarizes a pprf model.
summary(<pptr>)
Summarizes a pptr model.
wine
Wine Dataset

Developed by Andres Vidal.
